name: proof-guided-web-change-client
notes: The ordinary client request contains only an opaque candidate reference.
The optional local browser provider directly invokes the Playwright runner and therefore owns browser, filesystem, subprocess, clock, and signing effects.
Runtime-only browser context headers may authorize a target but are excluded from semantic scope, profiles, receipts, and retained artifacts.
The experiment has no Riddle-hosted client or configuration.
No browser egress allowlist is enforced: the target page may request redirects or subresources from other origins.
